title: China helped broker Iran truce, but it’s wary of deeper involvement
summary_full: Beijing urged Iran to accept a ceasefire, but it hasn’t agreed to act as a guarantor of the deal in America’s messy war.
summary_public: Beijing urged Iran to accept a ceasefire, but it hasn’t agreed to act as a guarantor of the deal in America’s messy war.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: China helped broker Iran truce, but it’s wary of deeper involvement
